MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Edward H. Davis, Esq. of SONNENSCHEIN NATH & ROSENTHAL 882-5004, for DEFENDANTS ANTHONY COWAN and JACKIE COWAN, moving To Strike Complaint Or Portions Of Complaint

RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANTS ANTHONY COWAN and JACKIE COWAN'S Motion To Strike Complaint Or Portions Of Complaint -- Motion to strike paragraph 12 for failure to comply is granted; no facts alleged. 2) Motion to strike Complaint is granted; not properly verified. 10 days to amend.
